overall.description: A stationary view from inside a cyberpunk apartment bedroom looking out a large window at a futuristic cityscape during the blue hour. Flying vehicles occasionally pass by the window while neon-lit skyscrapers dominate the skyline. The footage is from a video game, featuring high-quality rendered graphics with atmospheric dusk lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk high-rise apartment bedroom with panoramic city view

second flying vehicle passes by the window moving horizontally across the view

agents.ego_description: stationary inside the apartment, looking out the window at the cityscape and passing air traffic

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling window providing panoramic view of the futuristic city
unmade bed with rumpled white bedding in the immediate foreground
dark textured brick wall with mounted shelves on the left side of the room
small bedside table with objects on it to the left of the bed
dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers with neon signs and glowing windows
distinctive tall cylindrical tower with vertical strip lighting on the right horizon
glowing red and blue advertisement signs scattered across building facades

segments.scene_description: The camera remains completely stationary inside a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment bedroom, framing a view through a large floor-to-ceiling window. In the foreground, an unmade bed with white sheets sits beside a dark brick wall, while outside, the sprawling futuristic city of Night City stretches into the distance during the blue hour. Flying vehicles occasionally pass by the window, silhouetted against the dusky sky and the glowing neon towers that dominate the skyline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary perspective from within a dimly lit cyberpunk bedroom, focusing on the contrast between a quiet interior and a sprawling, neon-lit metropolis. It begins by framing an unmade bed with white sheets against a dark brick wall, establishing a sense of intimacy within the apartment. As the eye moves toward the floor-to-ceiling window, the view expands to reveal the vast expanse of Night City during the blue hour. The scene then settles on the distant skyline, where glowing neon towers dominate the horizon while flying vehicles occasionally glide past the glass, silhouetted against the dusky sky.
